title: Publish to Facebook Fanpage
tokenSource: current internal token from AGENTS, or /api/auth/token?bot_token=<telegram_bot_token>

apiCalls.purpose: prove saved Page token can read recent Fanpage posts
publish text or image post after CEO confirmation

successProofs: post response contains postId or postUrl
token verification stores pageId and pageName
negativeTests: must reject user token that cannot produce a Page token
must reject token that only has business_management and pages_show_list
must guide missing pages_manage_posts users to create a Messenger customer-interaction app/use case
must return explicit not-connected error when fb-config.json is missing
